# DefaultConfigurationRequest

**Object**

The request body that contains the default configuration information.

## Declaration

```swift
object DefaultConfigurationRequest
```

## Discussion

This is the request body for the [doc://com.apple.retentionmessaging/documentation/RetentionMessaging/Configure-Default-Message] endpoint.

## Default message configuration

- **Configure Default Message**: Configure a default message for a specific product in a specific locale.
- **Delete Default Message**: Delete a default message for a product in a locale.

items.description: Configure a default message for a specific product in a specific locale.
